hooks.command: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) 2>/dev/null && rustfmt --edition 2021 "$TOOL_INPUT_PATH" 2>/dev/null; cargo clippy --quiet 2>&1 | grep -E '^error' | head -20

cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) 2>/dev/null && python -m black "$TOOL_INPUT_PATH" --quiet 2>/dev/null; python -m mypy "$TOOL_INPUT_PATH" --ignore-missing-imports 2>&1 | grep -E '^.*error:' | head -20

python -c "import ast, sys; ast.parse(open('$TOOL_INPUT_PATH').read()); print('Syntax OK: ' + '$TOOL_INPUT_PATH')" 2>&1; if grep -En 'subprocess\.run|subprocess\.call|subprocess\.Popen|os\.system|os\.popen|os\.execv[pe]?|os\.spawn' "$TOOL_INPUT_PATH"; then echo 'BLOCKED: Dangerous subprocess/exec call detected in Cortex file' >&2; exit 1; fi; if grep -En 'shell[[:space:]]*=[[:space:]]*True' "$TOOL_INPUT_PATH"; then echo 'BLOCKED: shell=True detected in Cortex file' >&2; exit 1; fi

if grep -n 'blocking_send' "$TOOL_INPUT_PATH"; then echo 'WARNING: blocking_send detected — verify this is NOT inside rayon::spawn (RT-H03)' >&2; fi; if grep -Pn '\.unwrap\(\)' "$TOOL_INPUT_PATH" | grep -v '#\[cfg(test)\]' | grep -v '// SAFETY:'; then echo 'WARNING: .unwrap() outside test context — use .expect("reason") or ? operator' >&2; fi; if grep -n 'liboqs' "$TOOL_INPUT_PATH"; then echo 'BLOCKED: liboqs must never be used in production code' >&2; exit 1; fi
if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE '\| bash|\| sh|eval |exec |> /dev/|rm -rf|dd if='; then echo 'BLOCKED: Dangerous shell pattern detected' >&2; exit 1; fi
cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) 2>/dev/null && echo '--- VGLF Session End ---' && cargo test --workspace --quiet 2>&1 | tail -5 || true
